Terms of Service

Last updated: January 2026

These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of the RYZE website and your
purchase of RYZE products. By using this site you agree to these Terms.

1. Company Information

RYZE, INC. is a Delaware corporation with its principal place of business at
600 Congress Ave., Fl. 14, Austin, TX 78701. All correspondence regarding
these Terms should be directed to our legal department.

2. Returns and Refunds

To return a product, ship it to our fulfillment center at
1200 Warehouse Blvd, Reno, NV 89502. Returns received at any other location
will not be processed. Please allow 7-10 business days for processing.

3. Contact

For support questions email hello@ryzesuperfoods.com. For legal notices email
legal@ryzesuperfoods.com or call (512) 555-0142 during business hours.

4. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Texas.
